request: WF-4b: fix the Phase-11.5 changelog actuator classification source. Active mode currently derives [Unreleased] entries from previewProjectedVersion (semantic-release commits-since-last-tag) — already-committed work, not the impending change. Switch active mode to a caller-supplied-entries model: accept --entries-file <json> (array of {section, body, breaking?}) and render those under [Unreleased]; the changelog SKILL.md SOP has main-context (which knows the workflow's change) write that entries file before invoking the actuator. Preview mode keeps semantic-release for version projection. Rewrite golden-path/idempotent-reentry tests to the entries-file contract.
